annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the settings tab navigation at the top and label it "Settings tabs".
annotations.target_description: Horizontal settings tab navigation row near the top of the page
annotations.notes: Tightened to the actual tab navigation text row and separators.

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the Multiple Subscriptions panel title and first options and label it "Cart rules".
annotations.target_description: Top of Multiple Subscriptions panel containing the heading, subtitle, first toggle option, and its helper notice
annotations.notes: Aligned to the content column containing the title, subtitle, first option row, and first blue helper notice.

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the One Subscription per Customer toggle and label it "Customer limit".
annotations.target_description: One Subscription per Customer toggle row
annotations.notes: Expanded to the full toggle row from separator to separator inside the settings list.

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the blue and yellow helper notices and label it "Behavior notes".
annotations.target_description: Stack of blue and yellow helper notice boxes under the subscription options
annotations.notes: Extended to include the full visible stack of blue and yellow helper notices through the bottom yellow note.

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the fixed Save Settings action bar at the bottom and label it "Save changes".
annotations.target_description: Fixed bottom action bar containing Save Settings and Discard Changes buttons
annotations.notes: Current bbox correctly anchors the fixed bottom action bar.
